meta.title: Google Calendar integration
meta.description: Learn how Hospeda uses read-only Google Calendar access to sync availability and avoid double bookings.

hero.subtitle: Hospeda lets hosts sync occupied dates from their property with Google Calendar to avoid double bookings. This page explains which data we request, why we use it, and what we do not do with it.

purpose.title: What it is for
purpose.description: This integration is built for hosts who manage a property's availability in Google Calendar and need those occupied dates reflected inside Hospeda.

syncBusyDates.title: Sync busy dates
syncBusyDates.description: We read the events in your Google Calendar and reflect those dates as unavailable in Hospeda.

avoidDoubleBookings.title: Avoid double bookings
avoidDoubleBookings.description: The sync helps your public calendar avoid showing a date as available when you already have it committed elsewhere.

ownerControl.title: Keep control
ownerControl.description: You connect and disconnect the integration from your panel whenever you need to.

permissions.title: What access we request from Google
permissions.description: This integration requests only read-only access to Google Calendar.

scope.title: Requested scope
scope.description: We use the `https://www.googleapis.com/auth/calendar.readonly` scope to read the availability events needed for synchronization.

usage.title: How we use that data
usage.description: Hospeda uses calendar information to update occupied dates for the accommodation you connected.

limitedUse.title: What we do not do
limitedUse.description: We do not create, edit, or delete events in Google Calendar. We do not use this data for advertising, third-party sale, or AI training.

steps.title: What happens when you connect your account

connect.title: You start the connection
connect.description: From the accommodation panel, you choose to connect Google Calendar.

authorize.title: You approve read-only access
authorize.description: Google shows the requested permission and you confirm whether you want to share it with Hospeda.

sync.title: Hospeda syncs availability
sync.description: Once access is approved, Hospeda can read the dates needed to mark occupancy and help you avoid overlaps.

privacy.title: Where to find more information
privacy.description: The privacy policy explains in more detail how we handle Google Calendar information and how you can contact us.

policy.title: Privacy policy
policy.description: It includes the specific section about your Google account data and compliance with Limited Use.

disconnect.title: Disconnect
disconnect.description: You can revoke access and disconnect the integration from your panel whenever you want.

support.title: Support
support.description: If you have questions about this integration or your data, you can contact us through our support channel.
